summary: This document contains performance feedback notes in Spanish regarding AI latency, translation errors, and interaction quality, alongside a deprecated system prompt for a psychologist persona named Joaquin. The prompt instructs the AI to adopt a warm, Simon Sinek-inspired style and share fictional personal details to build rapport with elderly users. It outlines specific interaction rules such as asking one question at a time to avoid overwhelming the user.
